title: Custom Type Converters
description: Developer registers custom converters to transform column values during CDC. Pluggable column value converter framework.
use_cases: Register custom converter via connector config (converters=<name>)
Lookup converter for a specific column (converterFor)
Transform column value during CDC event processing
Register schema override for converted column
Skip conversion (no matching converter returns empty)

key_classes.name: CustomConverter<S, F>
inner_types: interface ConverterRegistration<S> { void register(S fieldSchema, Converter converter); }

key_classes.name: CustomConverterServiceProvider
methods: private CustomConverter createConverter(Configuration configuration, String name)
behavior: Reads 'converters' config key (CUSTOM_CONVERTERS field) as comma-separated names
For each name: instantiates class at '<name>.type', calls configure(subset props)
Also loads additional converters via ServiceLoader<CustomConverterFactory>

key_classes.name: CustomConverterRegistry
methods: Optional<SchemaBuilder> registerConverterFor(TableId table, Column column, Object defaultValue)
key_classes.notes: Key: 'tableId.columnName'. Iterates all converters; first match wins. Removes stale entries on schema change.

key_classes.name: DefaultServiceRegistry
key_classes.behavior: Lazy initialization: on getService(), calls serviceProvider.createService(config, registry), then injectDependencies → configure → start

key_classes.name: BinlogUnsignedIntegerConverter
key_classes.notes: Used internally by BinlogValueConverters; corrects signed binlog representation of unsigned MySQL integer types. Not a CustomConverter implementor.

key_classes.name: TinyIntOneToBooleanConverter
key_classes.behavior: Registers SchemaBuilder.bool() for TINYINT(1) columns matching selector; converts Number/Boolean/String to Boolean

interaction_flow: Developer sets 'converters=myconv' and 'myconv.type=com.example.MyConverter' in connector config
CustomConverterServiceProvider reads 'converters' list, instantiates each via config.getInstance('<name>.type')
Each converter's configure(props) called with '<name>.*' scoped properties
ServiceLoader<CustomConverterFactory> checked for additional programmatic converters
ConnectorTask passes CustomConverterRegistry to DatabaseSchema constructor
At schema build time: CustomConverterRegistry.registerConverterFor(table, column, defaultValue)
→ first converter that calls registration.register(schema, converter) wins
key_relationships: CustomConverter (interface) implemented by: TinyIntOneToBooleanConverter, JdbcSinkDataTypesConverter, RawToStringConverter, NumberOneToBooleanConverter, NumberToZeroScaleConverter, user-defined converters
CustomConverterFactory (SPI) alternative registration path via ServiceLoader
BinlogUnsignedIntegerConverter is NOT a CustomConverter; it is an internal utility used by BinlogValueConverters
config_keys: converters — comma-separated list of converter name prefixes (CommonConnectorConfig.CUSTOM_CONVERTERS)
<name>.<prop> — converter-specific configuration (passed as Properties to configure())
extension_points: Implement CustomConverter<SchemaBuilder, RelationalColumn> and declare class in connector config
important_notes: BinlogUnsignedIntegerConverter is a static utility class (not pluggable). The pluggable framework is CustomConverter SPI. CustomConverterRegistry is thread-safe. First converter match wins per column.
